question: A company is building a web-based AI application using Amazon SageMaker for ML experimentation, training, a central model registry, deployment, and monitoring. The application must ensure secure and isolated use of training data stored in Amazon S3 during the ML lifecycle. The company needs to run an on-demand workflow to monitor bias drift for models deployed to real-time endpoints. Which action will meet this requirement?

choices.A: Configure the application to invoke an AWS Lambda function that runs a SageMaker Clarify job.
choices.B: Invoke an AWS Lambda function to pull the sagemaker-model-monitor-analyzer built-in SageMaker image.
choices.C: Use AWS Glue Data Quality to monitor bias.
choices.D: Use SageMaker notebooks to compare the bias.
